title: A Stressful Morning Meeting
content: Emma arrived at the office earlier than usual because she needed to prepare for an important meeting with her manager and several clients. She reviewed her presentation repeatedly while drinking coffee and checking her notes. As the meeting began, everything seemed fine until the projector suddenly stopped working. For a few uncomfortable minutes, nobody knew what to do. Emma felt nervous, but she remained calm and continued the presentation without the slides. Surprisingly, the clients appreciated her confidence and communication skills. After the meeting ended, her manager congratulated her for handling the unexpected problem professionally. Even though the morning had been stressful, Emma left the room feeling much more confident about her abilities.
